title: Logue Rock
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Logue Rock''' was a sacred site on [[Champala/Legends|Champala]], from which many [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrians]] believed their revered deity-ruler [[Aram Acheron]] would emerge to lead his people to victory over their enemies.<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
